content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering User Onboarding (Beginner Idea List)
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between no SaaS knowledge and professional apps. Learn user onboarding with Antigravity and Claude Code in this student-focused guide.
content.answer_block: Overcoming the lack of SaaS knowledge starts with mastering user onboarding—the bridge between a user's confusion and your product's value. By implementing a guided, step-by-step walkthrough using Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform a complex, intimidating platform into a clear, intuitive journey that drives immediate user retention and satisfaction.
content.intro:
The screen glows, but your head spins. You have the code, but you lack the map—the architectural intuition that turns raw logic into a professional SaaS product. For many students, the 'no SaaS knowledge' wall feels like an insurmountable barrier, leaving your projects feeling like abandoned scripts rather than living, breathing businesses.

But the secret isn't in writing more code; it's in designing the path your user takes the moment they arrive. By mastering user onboarding, you solve the retention crisis before it even begins. We are going to strip away the complexity, leveraging modern AI tooling to build a professional-grade onboarding flow that turns every visitor into a power user.

steps.title: Defining the User Value Proposition
steps.description: Before coding, identify the 'Aha!' moment. We use Antigravity to map out the user journey from signup to the first successful action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead Product Architect. Define a 3-step onboarding flow for a task management SaaS that highlights the core value of immediate productivity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a user journey map JSON based on the architectural plan'

steps.title: Scaffolding the Onboarding Component
steps.description: Construct a reusable modal component that guides users through your app's interface without overwhelming them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React modal component for onboarding that supports step-based navigation and progress tracking.

steps.title: Implementing State Persistence
steps.description: Ensure users don't see the same onboarding flow twice by tracking completion status in the database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Supabase hook that checks if a user has completed onboarding and updates the 'onboarding_complete' boolean in the users table.

steps.title: Triggering Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Add interactive tooltips that highlight key features only when the user reaches a specific stage in the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a tooltip trigger logic that integrates with the existing onboarding state manager.

steps.title: Testing and Refinement
steps.description: Use Claude Code to simulate user sessions and ensure the onboarding flow is frictionless and bug-free.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite for the onboarding flow, mocking user sign-up and completion events.

pro_tips: Never force a login before the user experiences the 'Aha!' moment; let them see the value first.
Limit your onboarding to 3 steps maximum to prevent cognitive load fatigue.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure'—only show advanced features after the user has mastered the basics.
Track onboarding drop-off rates as your primary KPI; if they leave at step 2, your UI is likely confusing.
Always include a 'Skip' button for power users who hate being walked through a UI.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, implement a feedback loop using a simple survey tool to ask users what part of the app still feels confusing.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn a blank screen into a guided, high-converting product experience. Stop building in the dark and start engineering for impact. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
